messageId.description: Stable idempotency key — the Idempotent Receiver dedups on this (doc 05 §reliability).

correlationId.description: Correlation Identifier tying async request/reply and every message to its Case (doc 05 §11).

caseId.description: The Case this message belongs to — the DecisionRecord stitch key (doc 04 §5.1).

payload.description: The translated canonical body (a pure function of the decoded wire message).

description:
A **canonical envelope** (doc 05 §1) — the only shape the core sees. `type` is a versioned canonical
name (`loan.application.received.v1`); `messageId` is the stable idempotency key checked by the
Idempotent Receiver; `correlationId` + `caseId` tie the message to its Case (doc 05 §11).
